task.title: T01 Standards Sync For Rust Testing
task.description: Import/sync Rust testing standards (BDD, mutation, coverage interpretation, no-skip, traceability) into active standards and bind relevance context for this spec.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testing standards exist in active standards set.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Relevant standards are discoverable for this spec via standard.list/list_relevant_standards.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task closes with demonstrable function and just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Evidence includes standards diff plus successful just check.

task.title: T02 Phase 0 Behavior Inventory And Traceability
task.description: Define stable BEH-* IDs and map Phase 0 Feature 1.1-8.1 behaviors to executable scenario obligations (positive and falsification).

acceptance_criteria.description: Behavior map covers all in-scope Phase 0 behaviors.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Traceability artifact lists behavior ID -> scenario ownership.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task closes with just check green and artifact validation.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Artifact is linted/validated and just check succeeds.

task.title: T03 Early Gate Scaffolding (Non-Blocking)
task.description: Introduce staged justfile/CI scaffolding commands for BDD, mutation, and coverage without turning final enforcement on yet, so iterative tasks remain demonstrable.

acceptance_criteria.description: New staged commands run and are documented.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just targets for scenario/mutation/coverage scaffolding execute successfully.

acceptance_criteria.description: Existing just check contract remains green at task end.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after scaffolding changes.

task.title: T04 BDD Harness Scaffold
task.description: Add cucumber-rs harness, feature directory conventions, tagging rules, and one smoke scenario path to prove harness viability.

acceptance_criteria.description: BDD harness executes at least one tagged scenario path.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Scenario command exits successfully and emits tag evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes with harness scaffold in place.

task.title: T05 Wave A Scenario Migration (Features 1-3)
task.description: Implement behavior scenarios for Phase 0 Features 1-3 (typed lifecycle, replay durability, contract-derived interface/auth/replay protections).

acceptance_criteria.description: Mapped Wave A behaviors have positive and falsification scenarios.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Behavior map entries for Features 1-3 point to passing scenarios.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green and stage run evidence.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes and wave scenario run output is captured.

task.title: T06 Hard Cutover Delete Legacy Rust Tests
task.description: Delete legacy Rust behavior-test suite paths that are superseded by the new framework and document allowed post-cutover test forms.

acceptance_criteria.description: Legacy Rust test paths are removed per cutover policy.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Repository no longer contains deprecated Rust behavior-test files in scoped paths.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green after deletion.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes immediately after cutover deletion.

task.title: T07 Wave B Scenario Migration (Features 4-6)
task.description: Implement behavior scenarios for methodology boundary, task guard monotonicity, and typed tool-surface capability/transport parity behaviors.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mapped Wave B behaviors have passing positive/falsification scenarios.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Feature 4-6 mappings resolve to passing scenario evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes with Wave B migration complete.

task.title: T08 Wave C Scenario Migration (Features 7-8)
task.description: Implement behavior scenarios for installer/self-host determinism and manual methodology walkthrough coherence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mapped Wave C behaviors are scenario-backed.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Feature 7-8 mappings resolve to passing scenario evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes with Wave C migration complete.

task.title: T09 Mutation Gate Integration
task.description: Integrate cargo-mutants mutation-strength gate, survivor triage policy, and behavior-ID linkage in artifacts/CI surfaces.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mutation gate runs in staged local and CI pathways.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Mutation command executes and output is machine-consumable for triage.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after mutation integration.

task.title: T10 Coverage Classification Integration
task.description: Integrate behavior-first coverage workflow and classification outputs (missing-behavior vs dead/support code).

acceptance_criteria.description: Coverage run emits classification artifact tied to behavior inventory.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Report clearly separates missing scenarios from non-behavior code.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after coverage integration.

task.title: T11 Final Gate Enforcement And Parity
task.description: Flip strict enforcement in justfile, lefthook, GitHub workflows, and check-ci-parity so behavior/mutation/coverage gates are mandatory in final flow.

acceptance_criteria.description: Strict enforcement is active and parity checks are updated.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Workflow and local command parity checks pass with enforced gates.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes under final enforcement configuration.

task.title: T12 Proof Docs And Scripts Refresh
task.description: Update Phase 0 proof runbook/scripts/evidence index to reflect the new Rust testing framework and reproducible execution path.

acceptance_criteria.description: Proof docs/scripts reference the new behavior-first test flow.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Runbook commands and evidence mapping are updated and coherent.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task ends with just check green.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: just check passes after docs/script updates.

task.title: T13 Orchestration Trial Meta-Readiness Report
task.description: Produce a trial report evaluating shape-spec/task orchestration effectiveness, friction, and recommendations for using Tanren orchestration within Tanren itself.

acceptance_criteria.description: Meta report captures strengths, frictions, and proposed mitigations.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Report includes explicit go/no-go readiness recommendation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Spec closure criteria include final just ci success.
acceptance_criteria.measurable: Report references final just ci result as the terminal gate outcome.
